title: Computer Use: Claude, OpenAI CUA, Gemini

questions.question: What input does Claude computer use take, and what does it emit?
options: Accessibility tree in, keyboard/mouse commands out
questions.explanation: Claude reads pixels and emits keyboard/mouse actions; no OS accessibility API is used.
questions.question_zh: Claude computer use 接受什么输入、输出什么？
options_zh: 输入辅助功能树，输出键鼠命令
输入截图（基于视觉），输出键鼠命令
输入 DOM XML，输出 JavaScript
questions.explanation_zh: Claude 读像素、输出键鼠操作；不使用任何 OS 辅助功能 API。

questions.question: What is Gemini 2.5 Computer Use's distinguishing safety feature?
options: A per-step safety service that assesses each action before execution and rejects unsafe ones
questions.explanation: Gemini 2.5 Computer Use ships a per-step safety classifier as a defining feature.
questions.question_zh: Gemini 2.5 Computer Use 标志性的安全特性是什么？
options_zh: 每步都会经过的安全服务，对每个动作执行前进行评估并拒绝不安全的
硬编码的 WAF 规则
questions.explanation_zh: Gemini 2.5 Computer Use 自带的 per-step 安全分类器是它的标志性特性。

questions.question: What does the lesson identify as untrusted input across all three models?
options: Screenshots, DOM text, tool outputs, PDF content, anything retrieved
questions.explanation: Only direct user instructions count as permission; everything else is untrusted.
questions.question_zh: 本课指出三家模型都把哪些内容视作不可信输入？
options_zh: 截图、DOM 文本、tool 输出、PDF 内容，凡是检索回来的都算
都信任，没有任何不可信输入
questions.explanation_zh: 只有用户的直接指令才算授权；其他一切都是不可信输入。

questions.question: Which OSWorld / WebArena numbers does the lesson cite for OpenAI CUA at launch?
questions.explanation: Those were the launch numbers cited.
questions.question_zh: 本课为 OpenAI CUA 发布时引用了哪些 OSWorld / WebArena 数字？
questions.explanation_zh: 这些就是发布时引用的数字。

questions.question: Which defense pattern is NOT in the 2026 convergence list?
options: Auto-clicking through dialogs to save time
questions.explanation: Auto-clicking dialogs is the opposite of safe; the lesson recommends explicit confirmation.
questions.question_zh: 以下哪一项不在 2026 年趋同的防御模式列表中？
options_zh: 导航目标的允许/拒绝清单
为了省时间自动点过对话框
questions.explanation_zh: 自动点过对话框恰好相反；本课建议显式确认。

questions.question: What is the principal attack the lesson highlights against computer-use agents?
options: A malicious page or PDF embedding instructions in retrieved content that the model treats as user intent
questions.explanation: Trusting screenshots or DOM text as permission is the canonical indirect-prompt-injection failure.
questions.question_zh: 本课指出针对 computer-use agent 的主要攻击是什么？
options_zh: 恶意页面或 PDF 在检索内容里嵌入指令，模型会把它当成用户意图
questions.explanation_zh: 把截图或 DOM 文本当作授权，是典型的间接 prompt injection 失败。

questions.question: When is human-in-the-loop confirmation specifically recommended?
options: On sensitive actions like login, purchase, file delete
questions.explanation: Sensitive actions (money, data exposure, new logins) require explicit human confirmation.
questions.question_zh: 什么时候明确推荐人工介入确认？
options_zh: 在登录、付款、删文件这类敏感动作上
questions.explanation_zh: 敏感动作（涉及金钱、数据暴露、新登录）需要明确的人工确认。
